headline: $42B in opportunity ahead—for partners who move now.

video.playLabel: Play vision video from Angie O'Dowd

segments.text: in the agentic era—it will define it.

body: That's what this report is all about: Connecting our partners—current and future—with information you need to define your growth strategy and deliver value with HubSpot’s agentic customer platform.
The revenue opportunity follows. But first, HubSpot’s ecosystem forces shaping this moment:

takeaways.title: Industry-leading and growing at an impressive clip:
takeaways.body: Partnership Leaders named HubSpot a Top 10 ecosystem in the world, with an IDC-defined $42B in partner opportunity by 2030 at 21.8% CAGR.

takeaways.title: Driving upmarket and aligned in GTM and product:
takeaways.body: We saw +41% growth in $10k+ deals in 2025 along with ~16+ apps used by upmarket customers—and we're accelerating in the AWS marketplace.

takeaways.title: Guided by
takeaways.body: Customer value above all; Open by design; and trusted by default. These are deliberate choices about the kind of platform we want to be—and how we build with you.

bodyAfterTakeaways: HubSpot redefined marketing with inbound. We led the front-office shift for GTM teams. And today, our agentic customer platform is driving the GTM transformation.
Our partners have led customers through every shift. This moment is ours to win—together.

author.name: Angie O'Dowd
author.role: Global VP, Platform & Partner Ecosystem, HubSpot
